entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: What is your date of birth?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: My date of birth is August 22, 1990.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check that for you. Thanks, Marcus. How can I help today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I'd like to schedule an appointment for December 21st, 2026. Do you have any availability that day?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check the visit reason first so I can look at the right kind of appointment. Will this be for a routine office visit, a follow-up, or something urgent?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: It’s for a routine office visit, nothing urgent.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I did not find anything that week. We can try another date, or I can look for any provider. What would you prefer?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I really need that specific date, December 21st, 2026. Could you check all providers for any available time that day?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Yes, I found openings on December 21st with Dr. Zygmunt Lukowski. I have 9 a.m., 9:30 a.m., and 10:30 a.m. With Dr. Kelly Noble, I have 10 a.m., 10:30 a.m., and 11 a.m. Which one would you like?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Let’s go with Dr. Kelly Noble at 10 a.m. That works perfectly for me.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Your appointment is booked for Monday, December 21st at 10 a.m. It is a 30-minute office visit. Please bring your government-issued photo ID and insurance card. Also bring a list of current medications and any imaging discs if you have them.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Thank you, that sounds great. I'll be there with everything. I appreciate your help.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You're welcome. We'll see you then.
